scope: Public short-form wellness and home workout video patterns suitable for a friendly avatar-led fitness creator.

sources.title: Example public trend source
sources.evidence_note: Used as a placeholder for a dated source describing short hook-led fitness videos.

observed_patterns: Short videos perform better when the promise is visible in the first two seconds.
Low-friction routines framed around real-life constraints are easier to understand than general motivation.
Friendly direct-to-camera setup plus quick demonstration supports creator trust.
creator_fit_notes: Luna Fit should lean into practical relief, not intensity.
The creator's soft visual identity fits apartment-based routines and tiny habit formats.
